programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Exile

programme.desc: A woman's son dies during surgery and Deputy Police Chief Brenda Johnson is called in.

programme.title: The Closer: The Other Woman
programme.desc: Brenda is called to testify in a case of Pope vs. Pope, a custody hearing between her boss and his ex wife. Brenda's team investigates a death of a woman whose identity may have been stolen by an addict.

programme.title: The Closer: Borderline
programme.desc: Leaving the scene of an accident to get to a multiple homicide scene, Brenda finds herself unable to drive the streets of L.A. Once she gets to the crime scene, she and the PHD are faced with another challenge.

programme.title: The Closer: No Good Deed
programme.desc: When the star witness in a death-row inmate's appeal case is gunned down, Brenda and her team discover that there is more than one suspect with a motive. Meanwhile, Chief Pope's vengeful ex-wife airs Brenda's secrets in front of her team.

programme.title: The Closer: Overkill
programme.desc: Brenda and Fritz have a hard time agreeing who is in charge when an informant's wife and FBI agent are both murdered. Brenda discovers that she and the PHD must work quickly when the leading witness in the case testifies against a powerful mobster.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Pilot
programme.desc: Doug is the envy of his neighbourhood when Carrie surprises him with a big-screen TV.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Head First
programme.desc: Doug realizes that befriending Arthur has some real benefits when they go out together.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Fat City
programme.desc: Doug is worried that Carrie has put on a few pounds and may wind up resembling her mother.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Richie's Song
programme.desc: Carrie refuses to double date with Richie and his obnoxious cheating wife, Marie.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Cello, Goodbye
programme.desc: Doug worries when Carrie's new job in a posh Manhattan law firm keeps her working late.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Paternal Affairs

programme.title: The King of Queens: The Rock
programme.desc: Doug and Carrie learn that her engagement ring is worth a fortune and decide to sell it.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Road Rayge
programme.desc: Doug loses his license when he is coerced into cheating on the driver's test.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Insignificant Others
programme.desc: A man's wife had taken her own life, and his college sweetheart had killed herself in much the same fashion fourteen years earlier. Investigators had to determine if this was a coincidence or an attempt to get away with murder twice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Catch 22
programme.desc: When a woman is shot to death in her driveway, police suspect a younger co-worker whose advances she spurned of killing her.

programme.title: Forensic Files: About Face
programme.desc: A skeleton is found on an abandoned plot of land, but before investigators can figure out who killed her, they have to figure out who she is.

programme.title: Forensic Files: In the Bag
programme.desc: A little boy is found alone and in a panic. When police go to his home, they find his grandparents dead in their bedroom.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shell Game
programme.desc: A tiny clue, no bigger than a thumbtack, held all the information investigators needed to put a trio of cold-blooded killers behind bars.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ring Him Up
programme.desc: For ten years, the disappearance of a college co-ed was a mystery until new scientific testing cast a different light on a man who had been a suspect all along.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fired Up
programme.desc: When a woman's charred remains are found in the rubble of a burned house, investigators have to determine if it is an unfortunate accident, or arson and murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Two in a Million
programme.desc: A millionaire and his family are executed in their own home. For three years the murders went unsolved, until a 30-year-old box of bullets and some iridescent fibers revealed the ultimate betrayal.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Concrete Alibi
programme.desc: An aspiring model turns up dead and the suspect is obvious. But when things don't turn out quite the way police planned, they have to dig a little deeper. Leaving no stone unturned, a forensic geologist points police to some unlikely suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Key Evidence
programme.desc: An Illinois community is outraged when an off-duty police officer is shot and killed. Police are able to key in on a suspect and with the help of a gunshot residue expert and trace evidence expert make sure their killer pays for his crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shopping Spree
programme.desc: A mother and her daughter leave home for a day of shopping, but never return. The little girl's body was found dumped off of a roadside, but there was no sign of her mother. Forensic science determined if the baby's mother was a suspect or a victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dew Process
programme.desc: The wife of a well-known dentist is found dead, and her husband injured. Investigators use some fibres and a study of local weather patters the night of the murder to catch the guilty party.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All That Glitters Is Gold
programme.desc: A bullet-riddled car, a missing driver and no witnesses poses a mystery, until a tiny and unique clue is found.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Rebellion

programme.title: Forensic Files: Drowning Sorrows
programme.desc: A family vacation turns tragic when a family matriarch suffers a tragic fall to her death. The circumstances surround the fall lead the investigators to think foul play was involved. Findings from a pathologist confirm their doubts.

programme.desc: Fire rips through a Seattle woman's apartment and some unsettling evidence is found in the rubble. Shortly after, a second fire breaks out just 100 feet from the first, and evidence points to a serial killer whose skills are evolving.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Innovate and Overcome
programme.desc: In a race against winter, Shawn extends his sluice to get more gold; Ken pushes the Myrtle 24 hours a day; Emily tangles with the tide; Kris battles a bed of quartz and George enjoys a season-ending dive with his son.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: King of Nome
programme.desc: Desperate to be Nome's gold king, Shawn risks the Christine Rose in dangerous waters. Ken struggles to free the Myrtle from the harbour. Emily fights a fouled airline and Kris attempts one more dive at the Bluff.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Dredged Up: Double Down
programme.desc: With added facts and bonus content: The season kicks off with the worst conditions possible. Shawn and Ken put more than their reputations on the line. Emily is on a collision course for success.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Dredged Up: Unleash the Beast
programme.desc: With added facts and bonus content: The Gold Ship is finally ready to compete, while Shawn is racing to preserve his family legacy. Vernon is ready to run with the big boys on his new dredge, and Emily struggles to get her hotspot back.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Clash of the Titans
programme.desc: An epic Clash of Titans grips the gold mining fleet as Shawn constructs the largest washplant in Nome and Ken's mining monster roars to life. Vern prospects using his new innovations. Ripping currents threaten the Kellys.

programme.desc: Former DEA agents Chris and Jerry track down one of Pablo's top drug traffickers. Exclusive intel sends them racing to dig up a secret airstrip where the kingpin hid his drug money and a safe house where he stashed millions.

programme.desc: A first look at the new season of Alaska: The Last Frontier.

programme.desc: Todd forces his crew and Dave's crew to merge into one team. The Dakota Boys use their new equipment to get back down to the bottom of Glory Hole.

programme.title: Gold Rush: The Night Shift
programme.desc: Tensions mount between the dayshift and nightshift as Todd pushes his men harder than ever. Parker battles his ancient washplant and the treacherous road from Discovery Claim while Dustin risks it all diving for hidden gold in the frozen glory hole water.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Bedrock Blowout
programme.desc: Todd pushes the Big Red wash plant to near breaking point on his best ground yet.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Redemption Road
programme.desc: Out of Indian River paydirt, Todd comes up with a risky plan to hit his 1,000-ounce goal. A bad fall puts Fred out the game, leaving Dustin to dig the glory hole. Parker worries his season is over but his grandpa is convinced he is near the motherlode.

programme.title: Gold Rush: The Motherlode
programme.desc: Winter strikes and the miners wage the final battle for the mother lode. The Hoffmans pull out a secret weapon to thaw frozen gold-rich paydirt. Dustin plunges into the freezing waters of the Glory Hole and Parker mines the last ground at Big Nugget.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Appalachian Underground

programme.title: Long Island Medium: Parental Blessing

programme.title: My Big Fat Fabulous Life: Fat Hating Is Real

programme.title: The First 48: Murder in Treme

programme.title: The First 48: Endless Love and Out of Time

programme.title: The First 48: The House on Madrona Street
programme.desc: A young woman is found on the floor of an abandoned house, naked and strangled to death. As the investigation unfolds, further horrors are revealed and detectives must act fast before the suspect kills again.

programme.title: The First 48: Fallen Hero/ The Last Deal
programme.desc: In Mobile, when a 90-year- old war hero is shot in the back, detectives discover his former neighbor may hold the key to what went down. In Tulsa, a young man's future is cut short when a plan to make a quick buck goes horribly wrong.

programme.title: The First 48: Blood Feud

programme.title: The First 48: Taken for a Ride
programme.desc: In Atlanta, a brash murder in front of an elementary school turns up a familiar name.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Bidder Loser
programme.desc: The guys ask strangers to help them bury bizarre items, and then they try to cling onto strangers’ cars. The big loser makes enemies at an auction house.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Statue of Limitations
programme.desc: The guys pose as inhospitable restaurant hosts, then beg strangers to babysit their grandfathers. Plus the longest punishment in Jokers' history.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: You're Cut Off
programme.desc: The guys pose as employees at a copy centre, conduct bizarre exit interviews for moviegoers and then lead some very peculiar protests. Later, it's unhappy hour for tonight's big loser, as he cuts off paying customers at a party.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Good, the Bad and the Punished
programme.desc: The guys pose as cranky NY cab drivers, then solicit undeserved congrats in the park. Then, tonight's loser is sheriff of an old Nevada town.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Putting the P in Pool
programme.desc: The guys pose as crummy cashiers at a grocery store and then play with laser pointers at a mall. Plus, tonight's loser gets soaked with embarrassment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Brother of the Sisterhood
programme.desc: The guys play helpless oddballs in a waiting room, then ask grocery shoppers for cash. Then, tonight's loser becomes the number one enemy of women everywhere.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Drum and Drummer
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Q and Joe convince shoppers to repeat odd catch phrases, then go mental as psychoanalysts. Plus, tonight's losers perform at a halftime show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Lords of the Ring
programme.desc: The guys skirt the law while posing as receptionists, then go fishing at an unlikely locale. And the heat is on tonight's big losers as they try to give one unlucky customer the deal of a lifetime.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Bull Shiatsu
programme.desc: Sal, Joe, Murr and Q try to hold it together as receptionists checking in some strange characters. Later, they offer up odd rewards to helpful strangers, and the big loser gets the stuffing squished out of him at the mall.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Autograph Corrector
programme.desc: The guys rely on the kindness of strangers to help answer some awkward questions, then go looking for love in the park. Plus, tonight's big loser strikes out amongst baseball fans with an assist from Yankees legend Tino Martinez.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Himself
programme.desc: In the season finale, Adam battles with his inner self-doubt over how biases affect the show. He then explore the shortcomings of storytelling and the influence (or lack thereof) of advertising on the integrity of the series.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Cops
programme.desc: Adam looks at the truth behind the overuse of SWAT Teams, illustrates how using school officers can create a pipeline for prisons, and examines the origins and intended purpose of police officers.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Bogey Man
programme.desc: The laughing gas flows freely when the guys pose as dental assistants. Later, they make headlines for all the wrong reasons, and get burned giving some campfire tips. Plus, tonight’s big loser scores a hole in none on the links.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: No Good Deed
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Murr and Joe compete in a focus group face-off, convincing people that their TV show ideas are the tops, and tonight's losers might get run out of town when they reveal their financial mismanagement plan to charity donors.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Indecent Proposal
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q don absurd disguises to trick unsuspecting receptionists, then try to convince strangers to sign off on some unusual emails. Plus, the big loser turns a harmless dance class into a dance with danger.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: No Child Left Behind
programme.desc: The guys pitch toys that should be kept away from tots, face off at a market, and see sports at the mall. The big loser sticks his nose where it doesn't belong.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Himself
programme.desc: In the season finale, Adam battles with his inner self-doubt over how biases affect the show. He then explore the shortcomings of storytelling and the influence (or lack thereof) of advertising on the integrity of the series.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Spa Day
programme.desc: Pricey detox treatments may do more harm than good, MSG's scary reputation is undeserved and the placebo effect is way more powerful than one may think.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Science
programme.desc: Testing mice means wasted resources because what works on them often fails on humans. Scarce funding stops scientists from seeking cures, and there's no money in reproducing results, even though it's essential in proving findings.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins the Future
programme.desc: Unregulated food expiration dates lead to massive waste, your 401K won't be enough to support your retirement and the future is unpredictable.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins a Plate of Nachos
programme.desc: Adam dishes out the facts on the avocado trade being ruled by drug cartels, and big pork making bacon a pop culture hit while covering up its huge health risks. Plus, America's food problems stem from corn.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins a Sitcom
programme.desc: Adam tackles classic television stereotypes, from the racism behind public pools, to the 'model minority' myth of Asian Americans, to the on-screen toxic masculinity that's masking the problems young men face today.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Rules of the Game

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Another Bite: Ice Breaker
programme.desc: Steve Irwin takes us on a frozen adventure to Antarctica to interact with amazing wildlife. He goes tobogganing with penguins, encounters notoriously dangerous leopard seals and swims with two curious humpback whales.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Another Bite: River of the Dammed
programme.desc: Steve travels to Central America as a guest of the Belize Zoo. Dropped by helicopter into a remote area of the Macal River, Steve tracks down a colony of morelet crocodiles and encounters the venomous fer-de-lance snake.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Protect and Preserve: Riverside Stakeout
programme.desc: Nature lovers show up for Discover Wild New Hampshire Day. Officers conduct an undercover surveillance. Officer McKee rescues a starving owl from the side of the road. Later on, Mount Monadnock, a perilous rescue of an injured hiker.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Uncuffed: Guns on the Border
programme.desc: The wardens are going up north where the potential crimes escalate and they encounter several suspects who are armed and one who is a potential danger to themselves.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Crocodile Coast
programme.desc: Steve, Terri and Bindi venture along the west Australian coast in search of crocodiles and sharks. They encounter wild crocodiles in the thick oozie mud of the Kimberley Coast. Also, on a reef off the coast, Steve dives with a mass of sea snakes.

programme.title: Too Cute!: Kittens and Canines
programme.desc: A litter of orphaned kittens trail a pair of Dandy Dinmont Terriers. The only girl in a litter of four American Bobtails hunts for her place in the pack. Finally, a naughty Tonkinese kitten proves a handful for her prim and proper mom.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Guilt Stricken Guardian
programme.desc: Jackson needs to find a way to help a distressed Philly cat named Dale whose uncontrollable peeing is driving a wedge between his guardians. It proves nearly impossible for Jackson to get a guilt stricken guardian to stop feeding her diabetic cat Lasagna.

programme.title: Dr. Dee: Alaska Vet: Farm Frenzy
programme.desc: Dr. Dee flies her mom to a remote vet clinic in Manley Hot Springs, Alaska. Back at Animal House, a Rottweiler may have bone cancer and a bunny has an abscess that just won't quit. Later, it's all smiles when several St. Bernard puppies visit the clinic.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: Runaway Dog
programme.desc: Dr. Jeff treats a skittish Savannah cat with an unusual condition. Dr. Amy helps a beloved dog who was injured chasing a coyote. And, the team tries to find the owners of a dog rescued on the highway.

programme.title: The Zoo: The Eagle Has Landed
programme.desc: A pregnant African wild dog has the staff anxiously preparing for the big day, zoo director Jim Breheny steps in to help a keeper learn how to handle a golden eagle and a new tree in Jungle World gives the gibbons a new world to explore.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Antisocial Otters
programme.desc: Kendari the babirusa, pig-deer type animal from Indonesia, is pregnant. But the two short-clawed otters she shares a paddock with are behaving like antisocial neighbors, throwing stones at her house while she's settling down to give birth.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Redeemed
programme.desc: Earl returns from rehab, hoping to rebuild his life working with the dogs. A couple comes looking for a dog who can handle crowded streets of NYC. Lizzy rescues a dog after a confrontation with the owner who abandoned it.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Down Below
programme.desc: A woman travels all the way from San Diego to give one of Villalobos' senior dogs a chance at a home. Lizzy and Marcel search for a mama dog's lost puppies out in the country. A new parolee makes a helpful discovery on his first day.

programme.title: I Was Prey: Silent Scream
programme.desc: Erin Greene is walking home from a Halloween party in a small arctic town when a polar bear chases her down. Triathlete Chuck Anderson is swimming in the Gulf of Mexico when a bull shark attacks, biting his arm and pulling him to the ocean floor.

programme.title: I Was Prey: Backyard Bite
programme.desc: Outside Corpus Christi, Texas, Jeremy Sutcliffe is working in his garden when a rattlesnake bite puts him on the brink of death. While spearfishing in the Bahamas, Kent Bonde is blindsided by a bull shark that tears the calf muscle from his leg.

programme.desc: Friends face different challenges as they prepare for life after high school.

programme.desc: During a joint Coast Guard and NCIS training exercise at sea, Gibbs and Agent Borin spot a deceased man overboard, who is discovered to be a missing crew member from a ship 60 nautical miles away. Gibbs boards the ship that was commandeered by pirates.

programme.title: NCIS: Parental Guidance Suggested
programme.desc: The team must determine if the murder of a navy commander's wife is linked to her profession as a therapist, or an act of terrorism, after finding the commander's name on a Jihadist target list. Meanwhile, the team discusses Halloween costumes.

programme.title: NCIS: The Searchers
programme.desc: After investigating the murder of a retired Master Sergeant, the team uncovers a fraudulent charity that preys on those searching for missing military personnel. Meanwhile, Bishop agonizes over the results of her probation evaluation.

programme.title: NCIS: Semper Fortis

programme.desc: Marcia Clark examines the mysterious death of Chandra Levy, the Washington DC intern who had an alleged affair with United States Congressman, Gary Condit. With no one held accountable for Chandra's brutal murder, Marcia investigates what really happened.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Love You to Death
programme.desc: Adopted 17-year-old Chelsea Schobert has always felt out of place at home. She seeks acceptance online where she meets Shawn. But as their relationship develops, all is not as it seems and the whole family is drawn into a devastating series of events.

programme.title: Web of Lies: People You May Know
programme.desc: Single mom Lorianna Parker is excited when she meets popular good-looking Corey Davis online, and filled with hope as their friendship blossoms. But when she goes to meet him in the flesh, her dream date turns into a living nightmare.

programme.title: Web of Lies: The Devil's Pact
programme.desc: When a young mother of three plummets into depression, she turns to the internet to find comfort. What she discovers is a virtual world of fetishes and fantasies, where seemingly helpful hands hide the darkest of intentions.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Jane Doe
programme.desc: Judith Therianos is a free-spirit; someone who very much wants to see the good in everyone. But Florida detectives unearth video surveillance that shows her utterly alone and blissfully unaware of the danger just moments before her life is cut short.

programme.title: Web of Lies: The Girl with the Lotus Flower Tattoo
programme.desc: When Jasmine Nunez moves to New York for college, a chance encounter leads to romance. But her new boyfriend finds her popularity on social media hard to swallow. When she goes missing, her lower back tattoo plays a key role in the investigation.

programme.title: Valley of the Damned: The Jehovah Jinx
programme.desc: Jehovah's Witness Pam Candelario is murdered during a home invasion and her husband Ralph is brutally beaten. But what appears to be a home invasion soon turns into one of the most bizarre murder cases that police have ever encountered.

programme.title: Diabolical: A Life of Lies
programme.desc: A shocking look at masterminds who used their wits to get away with murder.

programme.title: Web of Lies: The Girl with the Lotus Flower Tattoo
programme.desc: When Jasmine Nunez moves to New York for college, a chance encounter leads to romance. But her new boyfriend finds her popularity on social media hard to swallow. When she goes missing, her lower back tattoo plays a key role in the investigation.

programme.title: Valley of the Damned: The Jehovah Jinx
programme.desc: Jehovah's Witness Pam Candelario is murdered during a home invasion and her husband Ralph is brutally beaten. But what appears to be a home invasion soon turns into one of the most bizarre murder cases that police have ever encountered.

programme.title: Diabolical: A Life of Lies
programme.desc: A shocking look at masterminds who used their wits to get away with murder.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Jane Doe
programme.desc: Judith Therianos is a free-spirit; someone who very much wants to see the good in everyone. But Florida detectives unearth video surveillance that shows her utterly alone and blissfully unaware of the danger just moments before her life is cut short.

programme.title: Murder Calls: Down by the River
programme.desc: In a harrowing call, a terrified woman tries to give police clues: there's a gun, she's near a river, and her kids are at risk. After police find her body in the river, they learn a stomach-churning truth about a killer who's been a predator for years.

programme.title: Murder Calls: Death Mask
programme.desc: A concerned man calls 911 to say he's on the phone with his girlfriend, and she's in trouble. When police respond, her two frightened sons answer the door. Their mom has been beaten severely.

programme.title: Murder Calls: If I Can't Have You
programme.desc: When a man calls 911 screaming for help but too terrified to give his address, police scramble to find him. As detectives investigate, they uncover a shocking tale of torture and revenge one that proves that unrequited love can be deadly.

programme.title: Murder Calls: Big Sky Murder
programme.desc: A frantic woman calls 911 when she finds her husband shot to death. The investigation reveals allegations of harassment from the victim's ex-lover and eventually uncovers a complex trail of deceit, in a murder that was years in the making.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID Presents: Homicide: Bernie Tiede: The Real Story
programme.desc: Carthage, TX is shocked when millionaire Marjorie Nugent is found dead in her freezer. Wait until you hear who did it. A tale so gripping...Hollywood came calling.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: A Family Plot
programme.desc: Members of a Midwestern suburban family begin mysteriously dying off after weeks of flu-like symptoms. But after a third family member is hospitalized, authorities begin to believe something far more sinister is at work.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Her Last Chance
programme.desc: After two trials, Kimberly Long was convicted of brutally murdering her boyfriend, Ozzy Conde, has spent seven years in prison, and, with the help of The California Innocence Project, she now has a new shot at justice.

programme.title: Murder Chose Me: Road to Ruin
programme.desc: A hard-working family man is gunned down while doing a favour for a friend. As Demery searches for answers, he's confronted with a name from his past and an all too familiar tragedy. When more blood is spilled, Demery is pushed to his breaking point.

programme.title: Murder Chose Me: Unnatural Causes
programme.desc: The lifeless body of an elderly veteran is found prone on the floor of his own home. All signs point to death by natural causes, until Demery finds a series of clues hidden in plain sight, and uncovers a motive so cruel it shocks him to his core.

programme.title: Murder Chose Me: Fair Game
programme.desc: A handicapped fair worker is shot in the face for no apparent reason. To solve this tragic mystery, Detective Rod Demery must retrace the victim's final steps and string together a series of seemingly unrelated clues.

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers: Chilled to the Bone
programme.desc: A brutal murder and frozen crime scene shatter an idyllic Idaho town. A suspect's bizarre confession has police hoping for a quick resolution, but all is not what it seems. They must find an attacker with a gruesome MO before he strikes again.

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers: The Darkest of Nights
programme.desc: On a cold Virginia night a pretty and popular teenage girl vanishes. Her abandoned car is found in the parking lot where she works... but there's no sign of her.

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers: Ice Breaker
programme.desc: A frigid winter hovers over St Paul, Minnesota. 30 year old Kira Steger hasn't reported to work and her family and friends are terrified she might be in danger. Her disappearance leads to a three month investigation that halts to a heartbreaking ending.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Tojo: Japan's Razor of Fear
programme.desc: Japanese General, Hideki Tojo, is a cold blooded control freak, who takes millions to their deaths in the dirtiest war ever known. This is the story of the dictator responsible for Pearl Harbor, an Asian Holocaust and the torture of thousands of POWs.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Hitler: The Benchmark of Terror
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler murders six million Jews and invades peaceful countries brutally killing anyone in his way. Find out what could turn a high school dropout into the most evil dictator the world has ever seen.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Kim: North Korea's Evil Dynasty
programme.desc: North Korea's evil dictator, Kim Jong-il, ruled his country for 17 years without mercy. While personally enriching himself, he let his people starve to death and threatened to bring the world to the brink of a third world war.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Mussolini: The Father of Fascism
programme.desc: This is the story of the rise and fall of the man who became a role model to Hitler and some of history's worst dictators of the twentieth century and beyond, Benito Mussolini.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Papa Doc: Haiti's President for Life
programme.desc: Francois Duvalier trained as a medical doctor, but his healing touch was lost as he became the ruthless dictator 'Papa Doc.' The tools of his tyranny were violence and Voodoo. He killed 30,000 people, and kept a nation in fear of his mystical powers.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Stalin: Russia's Steel Tyrant
programme.desc: For 30 years, Joseph Stalin rules the Soviet Union with an iron fist. Anyone who stands in his way will be destroyed.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Gaddafi: Mad Dog of the Middle East
programme.desc: The story of the world's longest serving dictator, Muammar Gaddafi, and his 42 year reign of terror at home in Libya and around the world. His actions are so increasingly insane that President Reagan dubs him The Mad Dog of the Middle East.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Papa Doc: Haiti's President for Life
programme.desc: Francois Duvalier trained as a medical doctor, but his healing touch was lost as he became the ruthless dictator 'Papa Doc.' The tools of his tyranny were violence and Voodoo. He killed 30,000 people, and kept a nation in fear of his mystical powers.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Stalin: Russia's Steel Tyrant
programme.desc: For 30 years, Joseph Stalin rules the Soviet Union with an iron fist. Anyone who stands in his way will be destroyed.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Gaddafi: Mad Dog of the Middle East
programme.desc: The story of the world's longest serving dictator, Muammar Gaddafi, and his 42 year reign of terror at home in Libya and around the world. His actions are so increasingly insane that President Reagan dubs him The Mad Dog of the Middle East.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Mussolini: The Father of Fascism
programme.desc: This is the story of the rise and fall of the man who became a role model to Hitler and some of history's worst dictators of the twentieth century and beyond, Benito Mussolini.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: The Hunt for Che Guevara
programme.desc: Che Guevara is intent on destroying the U.S. The CIA sends agent, Felix Rodriguez, to Bolivia to bring him back alive. Based on new documents we now reveal the true story of this secret CIA mission to hunt down the world's most famous revolutionary.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: No Surrender
programme.desc: The war is turning America's way. Yet Japan is determined to kill as many Americans as possible and fight to the death. The US must determine if it has the stomach for the fight, or if there is a secret weapon that offers a quick way out.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Petersburg
programme.desc: The Union invasion of the south has ground to a halt at the seemingly impregnable ring of trenches built around Petersburg, Virginia. After eight bloody attempts to storm them have failed, two officers from Vermont will lead a daring raid.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Gettysburg
programme.desc: An elite band of Yankee Sharpshooters must stop Robert E. Lee's Alabamian shock troops from flanking the Union line and winning the battle of Gettysburg and perhaps the entire Civil War.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Antietam
programme.desc: Following a string of victories in Virginia, Confederate military genius General Robert E. Lee brings his army north in a bold attempt to end the Civil War and win Southern Independence.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Fredericksburg
programme.desc: Following the strategic Union win at Antietam, federal forces clash with a massive Rebel army in the town of Fredericksburg, Virginia in what will become the largest fight of the Civil War.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Nashville
programme.desc: In a daring attempt to regain the upper hand in the Civil War, Confederate forces try to retake the city of Nashville and sever the supply line that's feeding the Union invasion of the south.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Bull Run
programme.desc: In what will be the first real battle of the Civil War, untested and poorly trained Rebel and Confederate troops clash on the blood soaked banks of the Bull Run River.

programme.title: Hitler: The Victor
programme.desc: A look at Hitler's transformation from Fuhrer of the German people into the megalomaniac Nazi Messiah who triggers the global carnage of World War II.

programme.title: Hitler: The Fuhrer
programme.desc: A look at the mind of a dictator as Hitler tightens his grip on Germany and turns his sights to conquest. Experts investigate the key skills that enabled him to turn the tables on Europe's foreign leaders.

programme.title: Hitler: The Actor
programme.desc: Investigates Hitler's breathtaking rise from election defeat in 1928 to Germany's Messiah in 1933. Experts analyze his speeches, dissect his PR gift and interrogate the mind of a man who ruthlessly executes his closest comrade.

programme.title: Hitler: The Opportunist
programme.desc: A look at the first three decades of Adolf Hitler's life unveils what transformed a down-and-out Austrian into the undisputed leader of the Nazi Party. We reveal the truth behind Hitler's time serving in World War One.

programme.title: The Cowboy: Movies That Shaped America's Myth
programme.desc: Celebrating the icons and legends of the American West as immortalized by Hollywood. From the great stars like Clint Eastwood, John Wayne, and Steve McQueen, to the great directors like John Ford, Sergio Leone, and Sam Peckinpah.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: A Bright, Open Living Room
programme.desc: Turning a duplex back into a single-family home isn't always easy, but that's just what Nicole wants to do.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Master Suite Remade
programme.desc: Nicole tries to figure out a way to incorporate the old kitchen pantry into a new master bathroom and has to deal with outdated and out of order parts.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Back Yard on a Budget
programme.desc: Nicole doesn't have much to work with in the back yard, but she's making the best with what she's got. Lifting up the garage to pour a new foundation beats the cost of building a new one from scratch.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Revived Exterior
programme.desc: With work on the 4th Street house nearly complete, Nicole continues to fix up the neglected exterior.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Garage Door Greatness
programme.desc: With the Minnehaha house still sitting on the market, Nicole decides to put her own house up for sale in hopes that it will sell faster. But before she can do this she gives her garage a much-needed makeover and removes asbestos from her basement.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Unfinished-Finished Basement
programme.desc: Preparing to put her house up for sale, Nicole turns her attention to the cluttered basement and devises a plan to update the space while also keeping the unfinished, industrial feel it would have had when the house was built.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Cliff House
programme.desc: Off-the-grid contractor Gregg Smith battles the elements to build a cliffside retreat for a family wanting to reconnect in the Sierra Nevada Mountains. But for Gregg and his team, building in the middle of nowhere presents its challenges.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Ozark Paradise
programme.desc: A realtor and his three children set out to build their dream home together on a wooded ridge top in the Ozark Mountains of Oklahoma.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Cabin of No Return
programme.desc: An outdoorsy family of three is determined to build a mammoth off-grid cabin along Idaho's Salmon River after one of their properties was destroyed by a fire. The family takes on rapids to portage out materials and must finish before low tide hits.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Underground Living
programme.desc: Specialty builders Jon and Amanda D'Aleo design and build 'Earth-sheltered' homes for clients in Southern Colorado, but they weren't expecting a project this far off the grid.

programme.title: Boomtown Builder: 1912 Baker's House
programme.desc: A local sheriff and his wife call in Tim's help to modernize their home while keeping its historical nature. The original character of this house was stripped away by years of bad renovations, a bad design and a challenging layout.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Renovation Realities: Dale Jr. and Amy: First Floor Troubles
programme.desc: Dale Earnhardt Jr. and his wife Amy compete with Mother Nature and face limitations while renovating an historic home. Their goal is to create a guest bedroom, bathroom and laundry room on the first floor, but they discover unexpected damage.

programme.title: Renovation Realities: Dale Jr. and Amy: Rookie Ralph Meets Shiplap
programme.desc: Amy plans to create an open flow between the kitchen, living and dining spaces, but rotted wood and extensive termite damage present a serious challenge. Dale and Amy manage to transform the small, boxy rooms into airing and comfortable spaces.

programme.title: Renovation Realities: Dale Jr. and Amy: Always Read the Instructions
programme.desc: The Earnhardts tackle the second floor and reconfigure the entire layout while dealing with dead rodents, cat poo and Dale Jr.'s enthusiasm for diving into projects without completely knowing what to do.

programme.title: Renovation Realities: Dale Jr. and Amy: Backyard Oasis
programme.desc: Dale and Amy set out to transform their backyard jungle into a perfect space to entertain. They create the tile backsplash and a sink out of reclaimed materials and find a clever way to use a surfboard as a shower.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: The Basement Reborn
programme.desc: After an improperly winterized basement bathroom springs some serious leaks, Nicole remains determined to rebuild the bathroom better than ever. She also adds an egress window to the basement and builds out a basement guest suite.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: One Extraordinary Exterior
programme.desc: Nicole adds gutters, a new driveway and entirely does the house in stucco like the original. To complete this magnificent transformation Nicole restores the original brick front porch and tops everything off with some tasteful, but stunning landscaping.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Bathroom Beautification
programme.desc: Nicole takes on another design project while waiting for the Minnehaha house to sell. This time it's her client's colourful sea themed bathroom that needs fixing.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Red Barn Reborn
programme.desc: Nicole takes on her most personal project yet, her grandfather's red barn. The barn has fallen into disrepair and requires a great deal of structural work to make it safe and strong.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: A Surprise for Tessa
programme.desc: Nicole's doing a surprise home renovation for one of her carpenters, Bobby, and his family. Bobby and Karen started renovating their house two years ago, but their daughter was diagnosed with cancer and they turned their focus to her.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: A Surprise for Tessa
programme.desc: Tessa and her family are coming home soon, and Nicole needs to finish their surprise home renovation before they do. She tackles the laundry room and hallway in the back addition of Bobby and Karen's house.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: What Comes Down Must Go Up
programme.desc: Facing major structural and water issues at the river house, Mike and MJ decide to take the whole house down so they can build it back up right. This is a major setback, and their profit will take a big hit unless they identify some areas to save.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Decisions and Delays
programme.desc: Trusses go up at the river house until MJ learns that the permits for the new build have not yet been approved. Mike goes to the council meeting hoping to hear good news, but it's a waiting game in the meantime. Designer Sarah Richardson offers advice.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Debates, Decisions, Designer
programme.desc: The leaching bed is replaced at the country house, and work progresses until Mike and MJ find out an open permit remains on the barn. Later, the big day finally arrives when MJ and Lisa get married in a picturesque setting, as long as the rain holds off.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Here We Go Again
programme.desc: After MJ and Lisa's wedding, smooth sailing is wishful thinking as Mike and MJ are welcomed back to the river house by a river of muck. The deck posts and windows get installed as they rush to get the house closed in before the winter weather arrives.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Game Changer
programme.desc: Mike's vision for open concept at the suburban house hits a structural snag and MJ attempts to rein him in before the budget takes another hit. A fun surprise awaits the team at the river house, until Mike throws another curveball at MJ.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Queens of 'Cue
programme.desc: Roger meets with two Southern ladies famous in the barbecue world. In Nashville, Roger has eyes only for the smoked ribs at Mary's Old Fashioned Pit Bar-B-Que.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: One-of-a-Kind Rigs
programme.desc: Roger meets Josh Pollack, owner of Rosenberg's Bagels & Delicatessen in Denver, Colorado.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Mud and Steel in New Mexico
programme.desc: Roger heads to the heart of New Mexico where cooking with fire is taken to new culinary heights with mud and steel. Roger visits Comida de Campos in Embudo, a farm and cooking school where delicious feasts are cooked in cone-shaped clay ovens.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Beef and Beyond
programme.desc: Beef is king in Texas, and Roger Mooking visits two pitmasters who are elevating traditional smoked meats with exciting global flavours. In Pearland, Texas, he helps Ronnie Killen season and smoke brisket and beef ribs to serve at Killen's Barbecue.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Hidden Treasures
programme.desc: Roger Mooking sets out on a culinary odyssey around the country for Man's Greatest Food.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Smokehouse Reinventions
programme.desc: In Islip, N.Y., Michael Symon digs into a decadent, 17-layer smokehouse reinvention of lasagna with pork, brisket, bacon and mac and cheese. Then in Buffalo, a brewpub serves up the city's most famous export, buffalo chicken.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Comedy and Cooking in the City Of Angels
programme.desc: Michael Symon and hilarious TV star Billy Gardell embark on an uproarious adventure in Los Angeles filled with laughter, hijinks and visiting a perfect balance of legendary food joints and new spots on the scene.

programme.title: Food Truck Nation: Pork Buns, Falafel and Snow Cones
programme.desc: Brad Miller hits the road in St. Louis, where he gets a taste of authentic Hawaiian food from Buzz's Hawaiian Grill food truck. Brad tries Chef Thomas "Buzz" Moore's signature yellow fin tuna poke bowl.

programme.title: Food Truck Nation: Burritos, Kabobs and S'Mores
programme.desc: In St. Louis, Brad Miller visits the Seoul Taco truck, where Chef David Choi is serving up a unique spin on Mexican food by infusing it with the flavours of Korea. Brad samples a gogi bowl and the popular Korean barbecue burrito with kimchi rice.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Santa Fe, New Mexico
programme.desc: Casey Webb's search for the biggest and best in Santa Fe, New Mexico, starts with a sopapilla stuffed with carne asada. Then he takes on some game-changing ice cream flavored with the local delicacy, green chiles.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Portland, OR
programme.desc: Casey heads to Portland, Oregon, to taste mouth-watering Peruvian chicken, a succulent porchetta sandwich and a two-pound burrito packed with ten of the spiciest peppers in the world.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Kansas City, Missouri
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to Kansas City, Missouri in order to challenge three-pound almond butter and jelly sandwich known as the Elvis Challenge, a four-meat pizza with a tater top topper and a brisket sandwich piled high.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Phoenix, AZ
programme.desc: Casey heads to Arizona to unearth the Phoenix's most appetizing eats and take on eight wings slathered in a scorching ghost chili and habanero sauce plus two whole grilled habanero peppers.

programme.desc: Sabin Lomac starts this trip in the historic Fishtown district of Leland, Mich., where he roughs it at the Cove with their summer-fresh Campfire Whitefish and perfect Michigan cherry pie.

programme.title: Seaside Snacks and Shacks: Burgers, Beaches...Bananas!
programme.desc: In search of decadent eats by the seaside, Sabin Lomac heads to Lulu's a "high class dive" in Gulf Shores, for a fried green tomato pimento cheese burger and Lulu's gumbo.

programme.title: Seaside Snacks and Shacks: Let The Good Times Roll
programme.desc: Lobster roll expert Sabin Lomac starts his hunt for delicious eats by the seaside in Traverse City, Mich., where Sparks BBQ is famous for a "sundae" with pulled pork as the ice cream, coleslaw as the topping and beef jerky as the cherry on top.

programme.title: Seaside Snacks and Shacks: Endless Summer
programme.desc: Sabin Lomac heads to Calabash, N.C., for a calabash stew with fresh seafood and a one-two punch of sausage and deep-fried corn at Waterfront Seafood Shack.

programme.title: Seaside Snacks and Shacks: From Maine to Miami
programme.desc: Sabin Lomac heads to Manach, La., to try the thin-fried catfish, hush puppies and alligator sliders that draw crowds all the way from New Orleans. Then, he visits an artisan sausage joint in Traverse City, Mich.

programme.title: Seaside Snacks and Shacks: From Boardwalk Barbecue to Lazy Man Lobster
programme.desc: Host Sabin Lomac, a native of Maine and a lobster roll expert, is in search of the country's most decadent and delicious eats by the seaside. He heads to a bar on Long Island, NY where drinks are served beachside, and then enjoys food as boats arrive.

programme.title: Cake Hunters: Carnival Dreams
programme.desc: Mike and Miranda have always shared a love of fun and are planning a carnival-themed wedding, an homage to their first date, but the cake design is still up in the air.

programme.title: Cake Hunters: A Tale of Two Cities Wedding Cake
programme.desc: Opposites attract when it comes to one couple's hunt for the perfect combination of salty and sweet.

programme.title: Cake Hunters: Wedding Cake in the Big Easy
programme.desc: Mike wants a wedding cake that's loud and over the top, proudly representing their home city of New Orleans.

programme.desc: The girls each plan to spend Christmas with their families but a series of strange occurrences lead them to spend Christmas together in Miami.

programme.title: Frasier: First, Do No Harm
programme.desc: When Martin sets Frasier up with the daughter of one of his friends, Frasier wonders why.

programme.title: Frasier: Secret Admirer
programme.desc: A giddy Frasier mistakenly believes he's the object of a secret admirer's affection.

programme.title: Frasier: How to Bury a Millionaire
programme.desc: Owing to vengeful Maris, Niles must move out of his apartment and in with Frasier.

programme.title: Frasier: The Seal Who Came to Dinner
programme.desc: A dead, smelly seal that has washed ashore dampens Niles' beach house party.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: The Charm School

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Sentimental Anniversary
programme.desc: Lucy and Ricky plan a quiet anniversary celebration but the neighbours have other ideas.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Fan Magazine Interview
programme.desc: The Ricardos prepare for an interview by putting on their best clothes and manners.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Oil Wells
programme.desc: Fast-talking petroleum tycoon tries to foist some phoney stock off on the Ricardos.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Sisters
programme.desc: As a birthday present for Sophia, Dorothy brings Sophia's sister over from Sicily.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Stan Who Came to Dinner
programme.desc: Dorothy feels sympathy for Stan when he tells her he's going to have open heart surgery. However that sympathy fades when she learns of his many infidelities while they were married.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Actor
programme.desc: The girls vie for the attention of a famous TV actor when he stars in a local play.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Before and After
programme.desc: Rose is convinced she died during a throat spasm. This leads her to live her life to the hilt, totally disrupting the other girls' lives. Then, when the girls complain about her new lifestyle, Rose moves out.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: And Then There Was One
programme.desc: Sophia readies herself for participating in a walkathon. Meanwhile, Dorothy, Blanche, and Rose babysit for the walkathon participants' children. But when the event is over, a baby is left unclaimed.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Bedtime Story
programme.desc: When the girls learn that a number of relatives are going to be visiting, they reminisce about times they've had to share a bed and strange places they've had to sleep, including a train station.

programme.title: Home and Family
programme.desc: Actress Danica McKellar from the Hallmark original movie MatchMaker Mysteries: A Killer Engagement and author Debbie Macomber visit. Then, actress Diana Maria Riva talks about Sunnyside.

programme.title: Movie: Chance at Romance
programme.desc: A woman thinks she has met the man of her dreams online. But after she's invited to an art show in his hometown she finds out she's been communicating with the man's son and that her dream guys isn't interested in a relationship.

programme.title: Movie: All for Love
programme.desc: A romance novelist worries she's lost her touch after a string of unsuccessful events. She sets her new book around a Navy Seal hero and dives into research with a retired Seal who teaches her skills she didn't know she had.

programme.title: Movie: The Convenient Groom
programme.desc: A young celebrity marriage counselor is left at the altar of her own publicized wedding. To save face, she accepts an offer from her contractor, who steps in as a groom and marries her.

programme.title: South Park: Britney's New Look
programme.desc: When the boys help Britney Spears get to the North Pole, they discover the shocking secret behind her popularity.

programme.title: South Park: Tweek vs. Craig
programme.desc: The boys instigate a fight between Tweek and Craig in shop class. Meanwhile, Mr. Adler, the shop teacher, is haunted by a recurring dream of his lost love.

programme.title: South Park: Something Wall-Mart This Way Comes
programme.desc: In order to save South Park, Stan and Kyle have to find a way to destroy the ever-expanding Wall Mart superstore while keeping Cartman from stabbing them in the back.

programme.title: South Park: Best Friends Forever
programme.desc: When Kenny meets with an unfortunate accident, Cartman lobbies to let Kenny die so he can get what Kenny left to him in Kenny's will. Meanwhile, Kenny is called upon to fight against the forces of Satan in heaven using his PSP skills.

programme.title: South Park: Lil' Crime Stoppers
programme.desc: After they return a missing doll to a little girl, the Park County Police Department recognizes the boys' efforts and names them Junior Deputies.

programme.title: South Park: Up the Down Steroid

programme.desc: Brenda and Fritz have a hard time agreeing who is in charge when an informant's wife and FBI agent are both murdered. Brenda discovers that she and the PHD must work quickly when the leading witness in the case testifies against a powerful mobster.

programme.title: The Closer: Serving the King
programme.desc: Resulting from the showdown in the murder room, Brenda finds herself taking some involuntary time off. When she is asked to help a friend solve a murder that is linked to a terrorist group, Brenda works to find the killer and still keep it under wraps.

programme.title: The Closer: Serving the King
programme.desc: Glad to be back with her team, Brenda focuses on finding a terrorist-linked suspect. Working with the CIA, she realizes that she was given false information and wonders if she's been set up.

programme.title: The Closer: Home Wrecker
programme.desc: Budget cuts force Brenda to either give one of her team members to the counterterrorism unit or make Provenza retire early. The team investigates the murder of a family whose surviving son is the main suspect.

programme.desc: The body of a long-missing, young gang member is found.

programme.desc: The neighbour's dog barks at night, keeping Doug and Carrie awake.

programme.desc: Doug embarrasses Carrie when he arrives unprepared at her boss's elegant cocktail party.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pressed for Crime
programme.desc: Investigators have few suspects when a young waitress is mysteriously murdered in her apartment. A call from a pawn shop miles away shifts the investigation southward.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Finger Pane
programme.desc: Texas City police fear the work of a serial killer after two young women are found dead in the same field. They have little to go on until a third woman comes forward claiming she's the one who got away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: House Hunting
programme.desc: When a successful real estate agent is brutally murdered, panicked townspeople begin looking over their shoulders and locking their doors.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shoot to Thrill
programme.desc: A teenager returns home after a night out with friends, and discovers his father's body lying in a pool of blood.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Tight Leash
programme.desc: Law enforcement officials turn to forensic scientists when they experience difficulty in their attempts to figure out how a stalker was able to steal his victim's personal photographs and obtain the code to her home security system.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Muffled Cries
programme.desc: An attractive university student was forcibly abducted from a mall parking lot and never seen alive again.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Chief Suspect
programme.desc: The wife of a police officer is murdered in her own home. After a decade a newly formed cold case unit took a new look at the case, and using a fragment of a 911 call, they caught the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Water Hazard
programme.desc: The victim had ingested a massive amount of cyanide. An unlikely clue, a flaw on a mailing envelope, exposed a murderer who was willing to kill innocent people to get the one person he wanted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Capitol Crimes
programme.desc: Police suspect a man in a hit and run, but he leased the car in question to someone in another state. Police found the vehicle and took it apart, uncovering evidence telling them just what happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Undertaken
programme.desc: The medical examiner ruled the death an accident, but the detectives investigating the case thought the evidence at the scene indicated otherwise. It would take three years, an exhumation and a second autopsy to determine who was right.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Missing in Time
programme.desc: A young woman was reported missing after a fight with her husband. She was presumed to be dead and her husband was the prime suspect. Police were suspicious of a secondary suspect when he reported a suspicious fire in his car.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Naked Justice
programme.desc: The 29-year-old, pregnant wife of a young, successful attorney is found dead in her Michigan home of a gunshot wound to the head. Blood spatter analysis and a painstaking investigation led police to the truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sign of the Crime
programme.desc: Fire rips through a Seattle woman's apartment and some unsettling evidence is found in the rubble. Shortly after, a second fire breaks out just 100 feet from the first, and evidence points to a serial killer whose skills are evolving.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Writing on the Wall

programme.desc: A young mother goes missing after a night out. Police suspect foul play and begin looking into the woman's strained family life for answers. When the case goes from missing persons to homicide, a man claims an accident was to blame.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Family Ties
programme.desc: An esteemed couple is brutally attacked in their home, leaving one dead and the other gravely injured. The survivor identifies the killer but recants her admission leaving investigators probing for answers. A DNA hit captures the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hundreds of Reasons
programme.desc: A well-liked assistant manager of a Florida steakhouse in murdered while he closes his restaurant for the night.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cold Feet
programme.desc: A woman is abducted from her late-night job at a Florida convenience store. After she is found raped and strangled, investigators know the only way to pin down her killer will be through DNA analysis.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Vikings in America
programme.desc: Josh traces the Vikings' westward expansion from the volcanic landscape of Iceland to a mysterious settlement in Greenland and into North America. He aims to find out if the Norse explorers landed in the United States.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Ghost Ship of the Great Lakes
programme.desc: Josh tackles the mystery of The Griffon, the first ship to be lost in the Great Lakes. With a state-of-the-art submarine, Josh dives to find a ship so elusive that it's known as 'The Holy Grail of Shipwrecks'.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: The Secret
programme.desc: Josh travels all over the US to find the treasures featured in 'The Secret,' a cryptic book published in the 1980s. He meets with members of the book's cult following, who each think they're on the verge of finding one of the 10 remaining treasures.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Unearthed: Chasing the Snake Kings
programme.desc: With extra facts and bonus footage: Josh returns to the jungle of Guatemala and the archaeological dig at El Mirador to search for the Snake King Tomb.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Cracking the Secret
programme.desc: Josh Gates is on a nation-wide treasure hunt to solve a mystery no one has cracked for forty years: The Secret. Josh travels coast-to-coast and back in time using cutting edge augmented reality and tapping into a network of obsessed Secret detectives.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Bamboo House
programme.desc: Outlaw architect Michael Reynolds doesn't just live off the grid, he builds off the grid.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Desert Domes
programme.desc: Laura Williams is on a mission to build an off-the-grid home in the desert outside of Tucson, Arizona. She builds an earthen three-dome home by hand battling a steep learning curve and Mother Nature.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Cracking the Secret
programme.desc: Josh Gates is on a nation-wide treasure hunt to solve a mystery no one has cracked for forty years: The Secret. Josh travels coast-to-coast and back in time using cutting edge augmented reality and tapping into a network of obsessed Secret detectives.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Bamboo House

programme.desc: With help from a team of friends, an avid outdoorsman takes on the challenge of building a cabin in the remote White Mountains region of Alaska. The crew must work through snow, wind and mud to haul materials and build the cabin in just seven days.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Chasing the Fortune of Sir Francis Drake
programme.desc: Josh Gates searches land and sea for the lost fortune of legendary pirate, Sir Francis Drake. Joining treasure hunters and maritime archaeologists, Josh hunts for a lost cache of Spanish gold and the remains of Drake himself.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Medevac
programme.desc: An emergency in the jungle forces Todd to airlift one of his men to safety. Tony Beets becomes furious when he finds that Parker has moved his whole operation over the creek. The Dakota boys may be forced to abandon their hole.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Man on Wire
programme.desc: Jack destroys the washplant, forcing Dave to find a new way to run their dirt. Frozen pay disrupts Parker's operation and threatens to end his season early. Dustin participates in a dangerous operation.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Day of Reckoning
programme.desc: Todd's claim owner arrives unannounced to take stock of the Hoffman's operation. Dustin returns from the mountains just in time for the final clean up.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Go Big or Go Home
programme.desc: Parker Schnabel refuses to give up; he's not satisfied with his gold total and is dead set on bringing home big gold to his beloved grandfather. Nothing is going to stop him - not even the Klondike winter.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Grandpa's Last Wish
programme.desc: A 94-year-old mining legend, John Schnabel convinces his grandsons Parker and Payson to return to Big Nugget to prove there is big gold buried deep under Smith Creek.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Naked and Afraid of Sharks
programme.desc: Five 'Naked and Afraid' all-stars must survive 14 days in shark-infested waters.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Double Jeopardy
programme.desc: Two pairs of strangers, dropped on opposite ends of the remote Panamanian rainforest, eventually meet and must work together to conquer the Everest of extreme survival challenges.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Stomping Grounds
programme.desc: Elite survivalists Matt Wright and Gary Golding are tested by deadly spitting cobras and territorial elephants in an African killing zone. But Matt and Gary aren't alone each must protect a novice survivalist from the threats surrounding them.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Curse of the Swamp: Part One
programme.desc: Jeremy, a former Naked and Afraid survivalist returns for his chance at redemption in the infamous haunted swamps of Louisiana and is joined by determined Michelle, an Air Force veteran. When trouble hits the partnership early on the episode takes a turn.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Curse of the Swamp: Part Two
programme.desc: Jeremy and Melanie continue the hardest challenge of their lives in the infamous haunted swamps of Louisiana. They must endure constant threats from predators, while desperately trying to secure food to keep them going in this forsaken wilderness.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Damned If You Do
programme.desc: Find out which joker once included inline skating as a skill on his resume, who was a mathlete and a bowler in high school and which joker was afraid of the dark as a child.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Q-Pay

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Up Loser's Creek
programme.desc: Find out which joker ran for Congress as a write-in candidate, which joker was a top-notch salesman before starting the show and who had a job in finance.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Baggage Shame
programme.desc: Find out how Murr's old neighbour learns a little TMI about his personal life and which of the jokers Joe would want by his side in a fight.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Flatfoot the Pirate

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Quantum Mock-Anics

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Little Bugs

programme.title: I Was Prey: Terror in Paradise

programme.title: I Was Prey: Safari Horror
programme.desc: Bob Legasa and his friend are hunting in Montana. What he thinks is a bluff charge from a grizzly bear is, in fact, a near-lethal attack. While canoeing in Zimbabwe, Kristen Yaldor is thrown into the water and finds herself in the jaws of a hippopotamus.

programme.title: I Was Prey: All Alone
programme.desc: During an archery hunt in Cranbrook, British Columbia, Chad Dueck comes face-to-face with a mother grizzly bear. In Tracy, California, Walt Dean King is savagely attacked by a Brahma Bull roaming his neighborhood.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Another Bite: Whale Sharks of the Wild West
programme.desc: Steve, Terri, and Bindi set out on a luxury cruiser to navigate the rugged coast of Western Australia. On their coastal adventure, they swim with marine animals, dive shipwrecks, and explore islands full of wildlife.

programme.title: I Was Prey: Deadly Decision
programme.desc: Sandy Prince is swimming in an African river when she's attacked by a massive crocodile. While mountain-biking in Washington State, Phil Anderson comes face to face with a hungry cougar.

programme.title: I Was Prey: Close Encounters: Night Terror
programme.desc: On a family trip to the Canadian wilderness, 12-year-old Zac Delventhal is dragged from his sleeping bag by a hungry wolf. While swimming in the Pacific Ocean, Maria Korcsmaros is attacked by a Great White shark.

programme.title: I Was Prey: 20-Foot Terror
programme.desc: Micki Glenn is attacked by a shark during a dive trip. Hours from the nearest medical facility, she has to rely on her husband and friends to save her life. And, a couple celebrating their wedding anniversary are attacked by a giraffe while on safari.

programme.desc: A Rat Terrier pup tries to find his place on a ranch full of rambunctious siblings. A stylish Briard named Fresco has to learn to take care of her 10 supersized pups. And finally, a Japanese Chin named Carly tries to spin her way into the spotlight.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Baby the Bully
programme.desc: Jackson meets bully cat, Baby, whose holding all the female cats hostage, causing them to hide in the bathroom. Jackson comes to the aid of an interior designer's couch destroying cats, one of which is shedding pounds on a hunger strike.

programme.title: The Zoo: Walk on the Wild Side
programme.desc: The future of the American bison depends on a high-stakes race across the country. The reptile staff have their hands full with a diamond rattlesnake that needs to be medicated orally. A pair of cheetahs is trained to walk the grounds of the zoo.

programme.title: The Zoo: Baby Bunnies, Big World
programme.desc: Crate training Nikita the Amur tiger in preparation for her move to Washington, DC proves challenging. An endangered Chinese alligator shows signs of being pregnant. Plus, staff prepare to release rare New England cottontail rabbits into the wild.

programme.title: The Zoo: The Tiger's Dance
programme.desc: When keepers introduce two tigers as potential mates, the process proves bumpy. A pair of African porcupines arrive at the zoo, requiring delicate handling. And a pregnancy check on a 3,000 pound rhino necessitates some highly specialized equipment.

programme.title: Give a Dog a Home: Live!
programme.desc: There are thousands of animals in shelters across the U.S. in need of good, loving homes. Now Animal Planet, with Best Friends Animal Society, wants to connect these animals directly to our viewers, live and in real time.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Hounded
programme.desc: When a dog that was adopted out mysteriously appears in a shelter in Mississippi, Tania and Earl head to the rescue. Parolee Joe is left shaken after separating two stray dogs fighting outside the shelter. And a hound dog adoption doesn't go as planned.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Kindness of Strangers
programme.desc: After flooding devastates Louisiana, Tia and the team at VRC race to help the victims -- including former adopters who have lost their home, and a woman separated from her dogs when flooding overwhelmed her house.

programme.title: River Monsters: Silent Assassin
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade travels to the Paran River in the remote corner of Argentina to investigate the death of a young girl. This creature is not armed with bone crunching jaws or razor sharp teeth, but a razor-sharp blade tipped with tissue destroying venom.

programme.title: River Monsters: Asian Slayer
programme.desc: Angler Jeremy Wade returns to the remote rivers of India's Himalayas to investigate a fresh spate of savage attacks.

programme.title: Movie: ATL

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Honest Abe
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars are presented with an Abraham Lincoln campaign ribbon from the 1860 presidential race. Then, Chumlee and the Old Man have a chance to buy a fully functional 19th century dynamite detonator.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Aw Shucks!
programme.desc: The guys meet a man who is hoping to sell a mysterious coin from the 1800's believed to be from George Washington's funeral.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Pin It to Win It
programme.desc: The team tries to discover the origins of a mysterious rifle brought into the shop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Jet Setters
programme.desc: A guy brings in a Wesson over and under pistol; a 19th century pocket watch winds into the shop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Goldfish and Silver
programme.desc: The guys check out a Honda Pilot ATV. Then, Rick and Chumlee give a seller shelter when he brings in a signed photo of the Rolling Stones.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: The Enigma
programme.desc: A WWII Enigma machine that was used by the Germans to send top-secret messages comes into the shop. Corey and the Old Man check out a photo of the Old West gunfighter Doc Holiday.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: April Fooled
programme.desc: Corey checks out a Civil War era sword made by Tiffany & Co. Then, the old man sails down memory lane with some mementos from his former ship, the USS Chowanoc.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Rough and Tumble
programme.desc: Rick checks out some items signed by 'Grizzly Adams' actor Dan Haggerty. Then, a piece of flag carried by Teddy Roosevelt's Rough Riders flies into the shop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Locked and Loaded
programme.desc: A 1763 flintlock pistol fires into the shop. Then, Rick scopes out an 1890s telescope cane. Rick and Chumlee venture to a galaxy far, far away to see some 'Star Wars' props.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Pawn Another Day
programme.desc: Madonna's 1988 day planner; a 1910 phrenology head; an 1800s locket with preacher Henry Ward Beecher; a 1980s egg chair used for hearing tests.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Lock, Stock, and Pawn
programme.desc: An all-star Dodger's baseball memorabilia bench, a 19th century Hobbs & Co. lock box, an original Woody Woodpecker oil painting, and a set of educational books called the Delphian Course.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Chum's Risky Business
programme.desc: Chumlee is holding out for a superhero when a seller brings in boxes upon boxes of inherited comic books. Rick learns you have to buy money to make money when some rare turn of the century currency hits his counter.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Money to Pawn
programme.desc: Don't get fooled at the pawn shop when a seller hands Chumlee a thirty dollar bill. Will this curious cash have Chum reaching for his wallet to buy it or will it turn out to be a costly currency that's not worth making a deal?

programme.title: Pawn Stars: A Killer Cap
programme.desc: A top hat and pistol said to have once belonged to a Jack the Ripper suspect have Rick greatly intrigued. Corey is set on obtaining a 1920s time clock. Rick and Chum must decide on the purchase of a slew of celebrity signatures and the rights to a game.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: International Pawn of Mystery
programme.desc: Chum gets groovy in Los Angeles while checking out an iconic Austin Powers movie prop. Back at the shop, an Ancient Roman relic marches its way in. Then, Rick tries to make a super deal on an autographed sketch of one of America's very first heroes.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Rick the Giant
programme.desc: The shop checks out some posters by artist Shepard Fairey, the artist behind the famous Obama posters. Corey and Chumlee look at the possibility of getting a Mork figurine. Later, Rick and Chum evaluate their friendship.
