programme.desc: Dre's sister Rhonda takes Jack and Diane to her part of town in a black neighbourhood and claims the twins are scared of their own community. Dre and Rhonda take them to a local diner to show them why it's so special.

programme.title: Black-ish: Sugar Daddy
programme.desc: Dre is diagnosed with Type 2 Diabetes and after talking to Pops, he's resolved to curing himself. Meanwhile, Jack is convinced that baby Devante hates him, so he enlists Junior and Diane's help.

programme.title: iHeartRadio Music Festival: Night Two
programme.desc: Night two of the iHeart Music Festival at Las Vegas' T-Mobile Arena, with acts by Alicia Keys, Miley Cyrus, Chance the Rapper, Zac Brown Band, Mumford and Suns, and more. Hosted by Ryan Seacrest.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Fake Monica
programme.desc: Monica's credit card is stolen, and along with Phoebe and Rachel, she decides to catch the person who stole it. The thief turns out to be so charming and inspiring that Monica decides to become friends with her instead of turning her over to the police.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Finale
programme.desc: While trapped in a small Massachusetts town, the gang gets caught in a legal entanglement.

programme.title: Mike & Molly: Mike Takes a Test
programme.desc: Molly encourages Mike to go after a detective position, but the stress of taking the qualification exam takes a big toll on their relationship.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Welcome Home, Jake
programme.desc: Lyndsey discovers that Alan is sleeping with Larry's sister, Gretchen. Meanwhile, Walden struggles with telling Barry to find his own place.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: Mama Drama
programme.desc: Adam's desire to be the lead in the school musical 'Jesus Christ Superstar' goes unfulfilled when he's cast in something other than the leading role. Insistent that her son is a star, Beverly casts Adam in a rival show, but he becomes too self-obsessed.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: You're Not Invited
programme.desc: Adam is very excited for his laser tag birthday party since he plans to invite Dana for the first time. But Barry thinks the theme is childish and agrees to help Adam organize a secret makeout party in the basement.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the Pop-Up Sale
programme.desc: When Max's stove breaks, Caroline tries to return some of her expensive rings to Barney's Department Store, but she learns that her surname is no longer an asset in her former home away from home.

programme.title: Daily Mail TV
programme.desc: Your number one source for celebrity news, gossip and photos.

programme.title: The Game: All Star Blues
programme.desc: Jason begins to question his future and starts planning for retirement when he doesn't get selected for the Pro Bowl game. Malik is selected and decides not to take Tasha with him to Hawaii, fearing she will embarrass him by trying to scout new clients.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: Sink Hole
programme.desc: When Mike and Boyd narrowly miss a sinkhole on the interstate, Boyd becomes petrified of leaving the house. Matters get more complicated when Mike and Ryan have different opinions on how best to ease Boyd's fears.

programme.title: Funny You Should Ask
programme.desc: Guest stars include Jon Lovitz, Vivica A. Fox, Louie Anderson, Byron Allen, Jodi Miller, and Billy Gardell.

programme.title: Couples Court With the Cutlers: Rowe vs. Buckner
programme.desc: She kicked her boyfriend out of their home and now a Georgia woman is in court to confront him.

programme.title: America's Court With Judge Ross: Doggonit /No Gear
programme.desc: A dog bite, an eviction, and a withheld security deposit; Man sues over clothes damaged.

programme.title: Justice With Judge Mablean: Roommate Rumble/ Fly-By-Night Producer
programme.desc: A dispute between former roommates over lost security deposit; a cameraman sues for breach of contract.

programme.title: Right This Minute
programme.desc: Stay up-to-date with the most viral videos online.

programme.title: Daily Mail TV
programme.desc: Your number one source for celebrity news, gossip and photos.

programme.title: This Just in With Robin Hamilton
programme.desc: Robin Hamilton covers local issues in the Washington, D.C area.

programme.title: Lauren Lake's Paternity Court: King vs. Porter
programme.desc: A man believes it’s medically impossible for him to have gotten his girlfriend pregnant, but she presents evidence to prove he is her son’s father.

programme.title: The Verdict With Judge Hatchett: Reunion Rip/ She's My Mom Too
programme.desc: A dispute over a custom dress; siblings argue over the cost of their mother's care.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Guests appear to expose their outrageous stories, from kinky relationships to crazy obsessions.

programme.title: Judge Mathis
programme.desc: A woman is suing her friend for an unpaid bill and lost wages as she claims he caused her to be fired from her job. Her friend is countersuing for the same bill and his lost wages as he claims she caused him to be fired.

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: Copping Out On A Cousin ; Caught In The Middle.

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: Stealing from an ex-husband; being stinky; going too wide.

programme.title: Justice With Judge Mablean: Canine Conception/ Joint Account
programme.desc: Owner sues over dog's unexpected pregnancy; dispute over withdrawals from joint account.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: A man is suing his ex-fiancée for the return of the engagement ring; the defendant claims her ex-fiancé is a and she shouldn’t have to return the ring. Then, neighbours dispute a botched car sale where the seller didn't mention the car was repossessed.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Did My Own Mother Steal My Money?
programme.desc: Courtney's saved money has gone missing, and she thinks only her mother Kimberly could have stolen it. Meanwhile, Princess believes her neighbor Keith has stolen her phone filled with nude pictures and sex videos.

programme.title: Maury: I Can't Leave Your Husband Alone ... I'll Prove He's My Baby's Father
programme.desc: Jasma is furious at Jermale for denying her daughter. Judy and Scarlet are back to prove to Judy's ex Cody and his wife that Cody's the father of their daughter. Jordan and Kiarra had a fairytale romance, until another guy said he was Kiarra's baby daddy.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Fights
programme.desc: Ashley and her good friend Paige are here because they are tired of 'no-good' women breaking up their happy homes. Ashley pregnant and her boyfriend and father to her unborn child admits to cheating on her with a woman named Summer.

programme.title: Maury
programme.desc: Maury Povich explores compelling issues that impact society as a whole, and digs deep to get to the heart of the matter.

programme.title: Movie: Wild Hogs
programme.desc: A group of middle-aged men try to put their troubles behind them as they set out on a road trip on their Harleys.

programme.title: Movie: The Family Fang
programme.desc: Baxter and Annie's parents are notorious practical jokesters, but when mom and dad suddenly and mysteriously disappear, the siblings must investigate to find out if it's just another ruse or if there's cause for concern.

programme.title: Movie: Justice League
programme.desc: In the wake of Superman's heroic death defending humanity, Batman and Wonder Woman bring together a team of superheroes that includes Aquaman, The Flash and Cyborg to defend the planet from an alien invasion led by the monstrous Steppenwolf.

programme.title: Movie: The Ref
programme.desc: On Christmas Eve, a cat burglar takes a bickering couple hostage and ends up providing counselling for them.

programme.title: Movie: Beerfest
programme.desc: Two brothers travel to Munich, Germany, where they take part in centuries-old secret beerfest. The brothers return to America bitterly defeated and form a team of elite beer drinkers to avenge themselves at the next competition.

programme.title: Movie: How to Lose a Guy in 10 Days
programme.desc: A magazine columnist has a very unusual assignment and a quick deadline. She has to write a firsthand account of all the things women do to inadvertently drive men away and she's got to do it in 10 days. Now she's on a mission to find the right guy.

programme.title: Ellen DeGeneres: The Beginning
programme.desc: The comedienne gives her latest spin on things in a stand-up routine from New York.

programme.title: Movie: Brüno
programme.desc: After disgracing himself, a fashion guru must leave Austria. He departs for Los Angeles in hopes of finding worldwide fame.

programme.title: Movie: Spooky Buddies
programme.desc: Along with new friends Zip, Zelda, Rodney, Skip and a friendly ghost, the buddies roam the halls of a mysterious mansion in hopes of putting an end to Warwick the Warlock's mean-spirited plans.

programme.title: Movie: Jem and the Holograms
programme.desc: A small-town girl is vaulted to fame after a YouTube video of her singing goes viral. Along with her three sisters, she adopts a stage persona and embarks on a musical journey of self-discovery.

programme.title: Movie: Gulliver's Travels
programme.desc: A travel writer becomes shipwrecked on an island where he is much taller than the tiny citizens that inhabit it.

programme.title: Movie: Rush Hour 2
programme.desc: Two police officers uncover a counterfeiting ring in Hong Kong and try to bring it down.

programme.title: Movie: Machete
programme.desc: A former Federale is hired to assassinate a senator, but he discovers that his mission is actually a betrayal by those who hired him.

programme.title: Movie: The Ladykillers
programme.desc: A group of thieves are plotting to rob a casino and hide out in an elderly woman's basement.

programme.title: Movie: The A-Team
programme.desc: Four war veterans attempt to clear their names when the military suspects them of committing a crime.
